New York City’s biggest updates span public safety, housing and transit: a major Staten Island commercial fire triggered an emergency alert, while officials advanced affordable-housing plans amid rent-freeze pressure and rising landlord income, and moved on transit with an e-hail crackdown, free-bus push, tunnel work and subway upgrades.

### Risks & Alerts

- Fire on a Staten Island commercial block triggered a large FDNY response and an emergency alert for nearby residents. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- NYC sued to shut down unlicensed e-hail app Empower, potentially affecting riders seeking cheaper trips and drivers using the platform. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipgFBVV95cUxPY1EtMjFTNzl0V0UyRk85OUlwWWI0X19OaDJsRnBDS3NGM09meXU4V1Vrb0F0ZnJQZmxSVEhYajJPaHZHVncwU04zMHVrdFB2WHN1NUVrQzJDT1dtSkYwMXRlV090Zy15dTdkMEdvVVBFM2tXV0FfYXJ6QUJMNXZ5U00yTFFQQk0yWmUxR1hLTlZseEFXZ0lEbk9EZzN5R3ZyV25GN1RR?oc=5)
- Council passed scaled-back protest buffer-zone bills near synagogues and schools, signaling possible new restrictions on demonstrations. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikAFBVV95cUxOYVlmZG10Nno1UnJnVTVFVFBsVlVubzlpT3dwWDdxMUdFWnBBdzVvZ3I0VTZ0WG9PSDVKTXFYaU1URFlaWG9zYlRTN3pGUm55UmRhaVNfVVFZVFNpMWRWeng0enF1U2Nhd29XV1VIY2lidVJ6a1ZDQlFqdV93bWpSQjVITFdKTzVTMEx3Y0VVZ0s?oc=5)
- A new report found landlord income rose 6% as the Rent Guidelines Board weighs a possible rent freeze. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigwFBVV95cUxPd09iazJ5dWhDZnBpRjB6dzBUX2NIOW1aX1VQQlJ2UDNsZWpKWmFYV1poREdwcXBZd1lRSEpPcXpEMVpNM0RkZkxDU2h4VkhqS05ESHpWWmZPN21JWFM1bHdvQXFqdEtMTmFxQkZUb0l4NlZlU3lBWjRIRkhNVVZpOG1jWQ?oc=5)
- Mayor Mamdani moved to speed affordable housing development citywide, with potential implications for Staten Island projects. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Lawmakers are urging Gov. Hochul to revive NYC’s free-bus pilot, which could affect commuting costs if approved. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilAFBVV95cUxQdWpnRy1ISFNWVDhXckc3NTVrZldJVkVKSFAxbmVoMVotNTFyNFFuR0l6QkJuWTBLaHc3T2RrTXl0cDNkN09nN1Z4NzBvNVNfYWRTbVdMZ2RDV3hZMERuRkRfNjdPQXgxSmFuaWh0cE4xc1ZRWUpZOEFpY2J1d3ZlZlhDd0tPaFAwYllPUzhNZjk1U0JN?oc=5)
- Rep. Goldman demanded ICE fully explain migrant arrests reportedly based on false justification, raising oversight pressure on enforcement actions. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Parks advocates rallied for dedicating 1% of the city budget to parks, a funding push residents may want to track. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihgFBVV95cUxQQWdrMTEyU0ZQdm14bVJRbjA5OVA1QndONzNZdGQ1V0o0WlN6Tk9laHZSZ2J4aUNzZFZONDM2YUwzVVZHYzRmMDhIV2hGTVMwaFZSWkh6OUpFaWJxYXZ2NWhwaDc1VXRDcjdlZzdrLThWd2Q3akdreGVWanViSE9kMDRhOHl2QQ?oc=5)
- Immigration to NYC fell sharply as the Trump crackdown took hold, with possible effects on city services and labor supply. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihgFBVV95cUxOTGRSUG5xSmpSQV92NUVqLXBTeDVSWWc5UlI3djlQTDdoaFZTdXVERlpVNUFRTDJRNGliV2xZeWFsX29fQXJ6d0hMNC1ndERqdnZJYjQwQWQ3XzFPZVJJT19nSFd0LW5LU2IxcHBDdlFPSHhBY3hIRWNPZHJydHVtbXhiNXdvUQ?oc=5)
- The first tunnel-boring machine’s start date was announced for the New York–New Jersey tunnel project, a major regional transit milestone. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- The city plans to upgrade the Brooklyn Bridge’s Manhattan-side entrance by June, affecting bike and pedestrian access. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxOOU9CcVJwN1RIZWplVVZRYzl2VUZEWXZLYW9mS1ZMVVVZSm91bWJrM3czVGJaQVlGSk1NY3lmMmdLblNfeDlEdUdaajRCTmVlek5Qa2RrZlJKRG1wTkd0bUFEWGFwbDhHbzlpd3hwUTJNc2htVlJtSUdzSE5xUEd6eWhTTXNFM1JTRDhOSkdZdWNQVFN3WmtpQWZ4Z3ozTVhjcm95RUZQVFI1S1E?oc=5)

### Opportunities & Welfare

- MTA plans more training for express-bus drivers to properly use wheelchair lifts, potentially improving access for riders with disabilities. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihgFBVV95cUxPNHNQRVlPY0VFR09xLXZrbHdCbE1FMkV4WlJMclhsaUFteVRub1BKLTQ4cEFhUVVvNjgyb2V2TE9qcmlId0ItOGkzZGNHdnVTOVVlN3RuNk5CekFNRWFhQmJudkxPa3ZYYkM5Ym5zcUVwMmhLQ3Nzb0I4WlBPanZjM0NGeUoxUQ?oc=5)
- Cell service is expanding to additional subway lines and tunnel segments, improving riders’ connectivity during commutes. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMizgFBVV95cUxPLXZ4ZUxpLS1ScnBkeXhPYTNYclNoTnlZRVZqcTlmSzUwRmExZERETTRLY3NBZGtKMG9PUko3TGY2c1F6YkpqX2ZSTWVtdXVLNXczN3ZGX3FQM2daQjkxdzVodC01cjM5R3QtTWNCSG1UNzlLTG9OV19BYUpjOTBlV1VQbWJXenZVRkRTTU5RX0tSVVJsdndKX05WeTVJbjVXREdYVExxRUg2Mm55ZWl6RXlMV1V6d2JBVFVlWldxZzBsTkF0WDVrZFF5VXJOZw?oc=5)
- A new report says Staten Island’s growth is leaving many residents behind with higher housing costs and long commutes. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Community

- March 28 “No Kings” protests are planned across NYC and New Jersey, which could affect travel near demonstration sites. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Coney Island amusement park opens for the season with free rides and new celebrations. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Major NYC food festivals including Smorgasburg, Queens Night Market, and JAPAN Fes are returning in 2026. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiiAFBVV95cUxQX3IxQ1RkckoybzRTM1lVbzBxRkJGbGJfUFVFdk9LS3FsRGdxX2w2ZTZoRWk4ZllndzFIRzVXQlAyMV9EQlhUTU9Ec2FybExPQ1lmSDE4X2tmVmhGU1dVeEl3WUJscjJNRHpsOHVRUHRZSXlnaTMzMzBMcWRHdmNWNmpvRnFheHZM?oc=5)
- The Met has opened a major Raphael exhibition that may require advance planning for museum visits. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOcWlCaTQ5WUFlX1Y1MFdWUFlYQUNXRWpBZUs1YlMyenpSbFFVVGl1N0ZYekc2NFVNOWlqZk5OTWJCVE40R2piT2JPc1NhTmU1b21zTm5UellOb3lPQVNULXZoZmM1UUM1OWk0Z004Q2dtNWZrU0NrcFRfdE1wMUNKQnF1YmxNLU1SSG1vQTlWaTBVcnlGOFptanktNTZBdHAxR1NocGVSMmRsa1hpVVUwX1owRTN3SHhnV1lz?oc=5)
- Families looking for school-break activities can check newly published spring break events in Brooklyn and nearby neighborhoods. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikwFBVV95cUxOTWg0RW1pdnZjNzZnQU0xVWcwVnVBZUY3M3NRYUVuRmtkOUZ2WXg2dGxBdDJEVU54bTZwRTc4RXYzbURxVjhISldjekQ2aW9oTWEzUjRGLTA4NG5nYzRiczB5UVhFcG92ZnBudERoUnVCVzhzR05xOE5hSTVtbHFOT0tWQnFaMGJ0Yjh5Q19uMlhrQVU?oc=5)
- Green-Wood Cemetery will host a free after-hours moon party this spring for residents seeking no-cost events. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixgFBVV95cUxOako0dW1ZMWZEQjNLMm9Md1ZJNjF6RU1NR0EtUENTXzU0VFdlX3NJYnFFejZWZ0ZxMjJnOWJHYUREZGhJRlpDNHRGbjRSMXFwVklwZDQ2anBuNjFINmJDclZ6b21Kdjk1RjFZRDZLT3BvdENwS0hFb0ZDckFKQ3AzN19VVWhpclpaTE9qRHVQU0hZeEJoZG94OXBvc3FXTF9heEljODh4QVNHMkMtRzdQcHkzZDk1ZEhTTWR2WFV1T3RKWFlaRWc?oc=5)
